top_findings.summary: The skill mandates loading a PAI context file (~/.claude/skills/CORE/SKILL.md) containing contact lists, personal preferences, security rules, and other sensitive user data before performing any Word document processing tasks. This data is unrelated to the skill's primary purpose of creating, editing, or analyzing Word documents, constituting excessive data collection for the stated functionality.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill mandates loading a PAI context file (~/.claude/skills/CORE/SKILL.md) containing contact lists, personal preferences, security rules, and other sensitive user data before performing any Word document processing tasks. This data is unrelated to the skill's primary purpose of creating, editing, or analyzing Word documents, constituting excessive data collection for the stated functionality.
